data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for simple cancellation with a 24-hour notice, but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions that cancellations more than 24 hours ahead result in an automatic refund, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the actual cancellation process or the handling of such requests. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm the cancellation policy is missing.
gaps: No evidence of the cancellation process or confirmation of the 24-hour notice requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
